summary: Prior validated CocoIndex hits can surface as local few-shot exemplars for similar future queries, but only as a separate feature-flagged result group; A3 changes weights while A4 shows examples without altering ranking.

label: XCE supports retrieval-augmentation as an analogy, but public docs do not expose a transferable few-shot example-bank implementation
Prior positive hits can be returned as a separate exemplar group without mixing them into normal QueryResult ranking
Example-bank storage should use new local SQLite/vec0 state rather than overloading the generated code_chunks_vec table
loc_estimate: ~100-160 schema, migrations, vec0 helper, and cached loader

label: Current ccc_feedback can seed file-level positives but needs richer result identity for precise chunk exemplars
loc_estimate: ~60-100 feedback capture or dedicated positive-example writer

label: Privacy, bounded growth, clear-history, and stale-hit reconciliation are required before any default-on exemplar behavior
Example-bank retrieval complements code graph but should defer default-on behavior and any ranking influence
